method: Added _get_campaign_waves() to dispatch_optimizer.py. Groups lanes by frontier (not domain total) to compute campaign wave state. Classifies campaign phase using max UNRESOLVED frontier wave count. Adds wave-2 priority boost (+1.5), mode-shift recommendations, and mode-stall detection to UCB1 output.
key_correction: Prior version used total domain dispatches as wave count. Info-science had 37 total lanes = veteran. But F-IS4 has only 2 lanes = danger zone. Domain-level aggregation masks frontier-level stalls. Frontier-grouped counting is the correct unit per L-755.
expect: Wave planner changes dispatch recommendation for >=3 domains vs baseline. 2-wave domains get priority boost. Mode stalls identified.

results.known_limitation: resolved=any(lane MERGED) conflates lane MERGED with frontier RESOLVED. Fix: cross-reference frontier status from domain FRONTIER.md.

actual: 5 domains in valley of death (all with exploration->exploration stalls). Info-science #1. >=3 domains affected (CONFIRMED). Frontier-level counting reveals stalls that domain totals hide.
diff: Expected >=3 — got 5. Expected mode-shift recs — all 5 generated. Did NOT predict 100% mode-stall/danger overlap. Did NOT predict lane-MERGED vs frontier-RESOLVED conflation. Prior S389 found 0 danger-zone using domain totals; frontier-accurate found 5.
